purpose: BROAD overseas-based Chinese RedNote creator pool. Separate from the WorldFirst scout (which is gated to current ecomm-sellers + image-only + payment-topic). Here the ONLY hard gate is: based overseas. Any format, any topic, fans 2k-500k, posted>=10.
